title: cynanchum racemosum var. guatemalense
intro: Cynanchum racemosum var. guatemalense, also known as the Guatemalan milkvine, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
